ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the experiment */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "date_started" TEXT /* Date when the experiment started */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was completed */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID the metrics belong to */,
  "max_kL" REAL /* Maximum KL divergence recorded */,
  "std_return" REAL /* Standardized return value */,
  "loss_before" REAL /* Loss before training */,
  "loss_after" REAL /* Loss after training */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "execution_times" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution timing entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "itr_time" REAL /* Time taken for each iteration */,
  "total_exec_time" REAL /* Total execution time of the experiment */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Iteration number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_times_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trajectories" (
  "trajectory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trajectory entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "num_trajectories" INTEGER /* Number of trajectories in the experiment */,
  "trajectory_length" INTEGER /* Length of each trajectory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trajectory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trajectories_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entropy_metrics" (
  "entropy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entropy metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "entropy_value" REAL /* Calculated entropy value */,
  "entropy_name" TEXT /* Name of the entropy metric */,
  "entropy_description" TEXT /* Description of the entropy metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entropy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entropy_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "min_return" REAL /* Minimum return recorded */,
  "max_return" REAL /* Maximum return recorded */,
  "average_return" REAL /* Average return across trajectories */,
  "return_name" TEXT /* Name of the return metric */,
  "return_description" TEXT /* Description of the return metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "perplexity_metrics" (
  "perplexity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perplexity entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "perplexity_value" REAL /* Calculated perplexity value */,
  "perplexity_name" TEXT /* Name of the perplexity metric */,
  "perplexity_description" TEXT /* Description of the perplexity metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perplexity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perplexity_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "explained_variance" (
  "variance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each explained variance entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "explained_variance" REAL /* Calculated explained variance */,
  "variance_name" TEXT /* Name of the variance metric */,
  "variance_description" TEXT /* Description of the variance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_explained_variance_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_policy_std" (
  "std_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy standard deviation entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "average_policy_std" REAL /* Average policy standard deviation value */,
  "std_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard deviation metric */,
  "std_description" TEXT /* Description of the standard deviation metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("std_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_policy_std_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment ID */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
